name: RadiFi Credit Union - Park Street Branch
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Park Street Branch in Jacksonville offers full-service banking with checking, savings, loans, and wealth advisory services to members in the historic Riverside neighborhood.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union has served the Jacksonville, Florida community since 1935, with the Park Street Branch located in the heart of historic Riverside. The branch is positioned as a community-focused financial institution combining traditional credit union values with modern banking capabilities. The Park Street location specifically emphasizes its neighborhood presence, with proximity to local shops, dining, and river views in downtown Jacksonville.

The branch offers comprehensive banking services including deposit accounts (with a high-yield checking option earning up to 4.00% APY), certificate products (13-month CDs at 3.75% APY), loan products (auto loans, mortgages, commercial loans), and ancillary services like safe deposit boxes, notary services, wire transfers, and money orders. They provide both lobby and drive-up access, with extended drive-up hours (Friday until 6:00 PM ET) and a 24-hour ATM on-site. Mortgage services are staffed by licensed originators, and commercial lending is available through a dedicated loan officer.

The branch distinguishes itself through member-focused service, highlighted by 1,110 certified reviews with a 4.5-star rating and testimonials emphasizing staff professionalism and willingness to go beyond standard service. They offer current promotional rates (0.25% auto loan rate reduction, $1,000 mortgage cash back, 1.90% intro APR credit cards) and membership incentives (referral bonus of $25). The team includes specialized roles: Member Success Managers, a Wealth Advisor, and Business Services Specialist for personalized service.

As a credit union, RadiFi operates as a member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit bank, theoretically prioritizing member benefits. However, the website provides limited detail on membership eligibility requirements, fee structures, or comparative rate advantages. The branch operates standard business hours (9 AM-5 PM weekdays, 9 AM-1 PM Saturdays) and closes for 10 federal holidays plus early closures on Christmas Eve and New Year's Eve.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: High-yield checking account earning up to 4.00% APY, competitive versus traditional banks
13-month CD special at 3.75% APY with $2,500 minimum, attractive for savers
Current promotional rates: 0.25% auto loan rate reduction, $1,000 mortgage cash back, 1.90% intro APR credit cards
Extended drive-up hours (until 6 PM Friday) and 24-hour ATM for member convenience
Strong member satisfaction: 4.5-star rating across 1,110 certified reviews with specific praise for staff helpfulness
Dedicated loan officers and mortgage originators with NMLS licensing (Jim Bystrzycki #1000667, Erika Baker #989622)
Comprehensive services in one location: deposits, loans, safe deposit boxes, notary, wire transfers, instant-issue debit cards
cons: Website does not specify membership eligibility requirements or application process details
Limited fee transparency: no fee schedule or cost breakdown disclosed for services like safe deposit boxes, notary, or money orders
Drive-up cash withdrawals capped at $1,000 and limited to members only, reducing accessibility for non-members
Limited weekend hours: Saturday lobby closes at 1 PM, no Sunday service, restricting access for working members
No mention of mobile app features, online account opening capabilities, or digital banking platform details beyond app download
best_for: Jacksonville residents in or near the Riverside neighborhood seeking personalized, face-to-face banking with competitive savings rates
Credit union members looking for auto refinancing or mortgage products with promotional rate reductions
Small business owners needing commercial lending with a dedicated loan officer relationship
Savers interested in promotional CD rates or high-yield checking accounts for everyday banking
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union's Park Street Branch is best for Jacksonville-area residents and business owners seeking competitive rates, personalized member service, and one-stop banking in a community-focused credit union environment. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is not clearly defined on the website, and fee structures for specific services are not transparent, so prospective members should contact the branch directly to understand full costs and membership requirements before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
